settings.title: AutoFull M6 Ultra 2.0 gaming chair
settings.desktop_price_text: From $47/month, or 3 payments at 0% interest with Klarna
settings.mobile_price_text: From $47/month, or 3 payments at 0% interest with Klarna

settings.title: Packs powerful performance.
settings.description: In the heat of intense gaming, this chair anticipates your every move. Its self‑adjusting lumbar support actively tracks your waist, cradling your spine’s curve in real time. The 4D headrest and 720° armrests instantly stabilize your neck and arms as you shift, eliminating strain. After victory, the 140° zero‑gravity recline and cloud‑like shock‑absorbing mesh launch you into soft, deep relaxation. Built tough with BIFMA‑level durability tested through 120,000 recline and 600,000 armrest cycles, it’s more than a chair—it’s a dynamic support system engineered for your body and focus, letting you command comfort in every scene.

settings.title: Designed for Pro Gamers
settings.description: Official chair of ESL Pro Tours and IEM 2026 -2027

settings.title: Dynamic Lumbar Support
settings.description: Adaptive support that moves with you, featuring 6-direction adjustability designed to track and align with your posture.

settings.title: Built-in Back & Leg Massage
settings.description: Integrated dual high-frequency massage motors in the lumbar and seat cushions deliver rhythmic pulses across the lower back, hips, glutes, and thighs. The system helps stimulate circulation and reduce numbness during extended gaming or work sessions.

settings.title: Active Cooling & Heating
settings.description: Improves airflow and reduce heat buildup, lowering seat temperature by 56%, or increasing seat temperature by up to 67%.

settings.title: 3D Cloud Headrest
settings.description: Featuring 3D Ergocloud Headrest adapts instantly to cradle your neck in any position.

settings.title: 6D Mechanical Armrests
settings.description: Whether you’re gaming on PC, console, or mobile, streaming, or working, 6D Adjustable Armrests move in six directions for precise support for your wrist and elbow.

settings.title: Designed for Your Scenarios
settings.description: Intense gaming, focused creation, casual entertainment, or lying down for a nap.

settings.title: Star Product
settings.description: AutoFull Partners in the E-Sports Industry - NiKO (CS2 Legendary Player)

settings.title: Adaptive Lumbar Support
settings.description: Smart lumbar support senses your posture in real time with 6-way dynamic tracking, relieving long-hour sitting fatigue.

settings.title: Lumbar Massage
settings.description: High-frequency deep massage releases tension instantly.

settings.title: Air-conditioned Seat
settings.description: Ventilation, heating, and massage in one — year-round comfort at a touch, keeping you relaxed even during extended sessions.

settings.title: 3D Cloud Headrest
settings.description: AutoFull adaptive headrest with ergonomic 3D adjustment provides precise cervical support for every curve, delivering a professional neck-rest experience comparable to luxury vehicle seats.

settings.title: 6D Mechanical Armrests
settings.description: 3D adjustable armrests move up/down, forward/backward, left/right. Whether typing, gaming intensely, or watching movies, your arms receive perfect support from elbows to shoulders for total relaxation. Every adjustment delivers personalized ergonomic support.

settings.title: Designed for Your Scenarios
settings.description: Intense gaming, focused creation, casual entertainment, or lying down for a nap.

settings.title: 6-Way Adapt-Tech Dynamic Lumbar Support
settings.description: Third-generation 6-way adjustable dynamic lumbar support ensures no fatigue,whether leaning forward for competitive gaming or reclining to watch videos. Prevents long-sitting-related lumbar strain, letting you game longer with peak performance.
settings.description_mob: Third-generation 6-way adjustable dynamic lumbar support ensures no fatigue,whether leaning forward for competitive gaming or reclining to watch videos. Prevents long-sitting-related lumbar strain, letting you game longer with peak performance.

settings.title: Cooling, Heating & Massage
settings.description: Integrated ventilation, heating, and massage system: Summer: dual fans for active airflow, keeping your back dry; Winter: graphene constant-temperature heating for deep warmth; Long sessions: vibration massage for instant relaxation and circulation boost. No extra devices needed; year-round comfort at a touch.
settings.tab1_text: 3 intensity levels, promotes blood circulation and relieves sitting fatigue
settings.tab2_text: 71.8cm³/min airflow | push-pull dual circulation for active cooling

settings.title: 3D Ergocloud Neck Pillow
settings.description: Ergonomically designed with U-shaped wrap-around design, ultra soft cloud-like neck support.

settings.title: 720° Multi-Directional Armrests
settings.description: 3D adjustable armrests support multi-directional movement (up/down, forward/backward, left/right). Whether typing, gaming intensely, or watching movies, your arms receive perfect support from elbows to shoulders for total relaxation. Every adjustment delivers personalized ergonomic support.
settings.specs_text: Height adjustment: 6 levels, 70mm travel; Front/back: 6 levels, 60mm; Surface rotation: 20 levels, 360°; Armrest rotation: 20 levels, 360°; Surface tilt: 4 levels, 39°.

settings.title: 160° Recline for Deep Relaxation
settings.description: The 160° recline and integrated footrest let you game, lounge, or recharge in any position. Easily switch from focused play to total relaxation with one-hand adjustment, while the multi-lock mechanism secures the chair at any angle from 90°–160° for personalized comfort and stability.

settings.title: FAQs
settings.faq_1_question: Is the Hbada E3 good for back pain?
settings.faq_1_answer: Yes. The Hbada E3 is designed with ergonomic lumbar support to help relieve back pain caused by long periods of sitting. It promotes better posture and reduces pressure on the lower back.
